children.heading: General authority
children.label: a General authority
children.text: The Secretary of Transportation shall enforce this chapter under section 89 of title 14. The Secretary may authorize other officers or employees of the United States Government to enforce this chapter under that section.1See References in Text note below.1

children.heading: Periodic examinations
children.label: b Periodic examinations
children.text: The Secretary shall conduct periodic examinations of vessels operating under this chapter transporting municipal or commercial waste to determine that each of these vessels has a permit issued under .section 2602 of this title

children.heading: Refusal of clearance
children.label: c Refusal of clearance
children.text: The Secretary of the Treasury may refuse the clearance required by , to any vessel subject to this chapter which does not have a permit required under .section 60105 of title 46section 2602 of this title

children.heading: Denial of entry and detention
children.label: d Denial of entry and detention

children.text: deny entry to any place in the United States; and
detain at the place in the United States from which it is about to depart.

children.heading: Persistent violators
children.label: e Persistent violators
children.text: The Administrator shall conduct an investigation of the owner or operator of a vessel or facility if the owner has 5 or more separate violations during a 6-month period.
